overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character in red armor running through a dark forest at night, transitioning into the Okada Farmstead area with traditional Japanese wooden architecture and a white ox.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with ancient trees

agents.ego_description: running steadily along a winding forest path surrounded by tall trees and dense undergrowth

entered.detail: large twisted tree trunk with exposed roots and mossy bark
dense overhead tree cover blocking most moonlight
narrow winding path through the forest floor
thick bushes and undergrowth lining the path

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a narrow, densely wooded forest trail at night. An ancient gnarled tree dominates the left side of the path while moonlight filters through the canopy above, casting long shadows across the dirt trail.

events.description: forest opens up revealing farmstead structures in the distance

agents.ego_description: continuing to run as the forest thins out and a farmstead gate becomes visible ahead

entered.detail: traditional Japanese wooden gate with thatched roof marking the farm entrance
rustic wooden fence posts lining the path
traditional wooden farm structures with dark roofs visible beyond the gate

segments.scene_description: The dense forest gives way to a more open area as the character approaches the Okada Farmstead. A traditional thatched wooden gate becomes visible in the distance, with farm buildings beyond. The path remains a dirt trail but is now lined with simple wooden fences.

scene_state.functional_zone: Okada Farmstead entrance with thatched gate

events.description: passing under the thatched roof gate into the farmstead proper
location text 'OKADA FARMSTEAD' appears on screen

agents.ego_description: running through the farmstead gate and approaching a white ox standing in the courtyard

notable_agents.action: white ox standing still near the farm buildings, facing the character

entered.detail: traditional paper lantern glowing with warm light hanging from the gate
wooden farm building with thatched roof and open sides

segments.scene_description: The character passes under the thatched roof gate into Okada Farmstead, transitioning from the wild forest to a maintained rural settlement. A hanging lantern provides warm light as the character approaches a white ox standing in the farm courtyard near traditional wooden buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dark, oppressive forest into the warm, structured environment of a rural farmstead. It begins on a narrow dirt trail at night, where moonlight filters through a dense canopy and casts long shadows beside an ancient gnarled tree. As the character runs forward, the thick woods gradually give way to a more open landscape lined with simple wooden fences that lead toward a distant thatched gate. The scene then shifts from the wild forest to a maintained settlement as the camera passes under the roofed entrance and into the courtyard. Finally, the cool moonlight is replaced by the warm glow of a hanging lantern, illuminating traditional wooden buildings and a white ox standing in the farmyard.
